item.title: Xiaomi confirms imminent launch for Book Pro 14 with Panther Lake CPU and 120 Hz OLED
item.description: The refreshed Xiaomi Book Pro 14 finally has a launch date. This new Panther Lake laptop will launch in China on March 19, 2026. The company has also showcased a brand-new colorway and confirmed additional specs.
item.author: Notebookcheck.net

item.title: Khadas Mind Pro review: High-end mini PC with Intel Core Ultra X7 and Arc graphics as the perfect basis in the Khadas ecosystem
item.description: More than just a mini PC. | Khadas expands the Mind series with the Mind Pro and relies on the latest generation of Intel processors. In our test, we take a closer look at the variant with Intel Core Ultra X7 358H, analyze the performance using extensive benc…
item.author: Notebookcheck.net

item.title: (PR) ASUS Announces 2026 TUF Gaming Laptop Lineup
item.description: ASUS is proud to announce the launch of the 2026 TUF Gaming A16, F16, and A18 gaming laptops. The TUF Gaming A16 and F16 boast two impressive display options, either a gorgeous 2.5K 120 Hz OLED panel or an ultra-fast 2.5K 300 Hz IPS display. Both models featu…
item.author: Techpowerup.com

item.title: Why I am actively recommending Intel’s 12GB Battlemage GPU over the RTX 5060
item.description: Hot take: If I were buying a GPU right now, in 2026, I wouldn't touch Nvidia with a ten-foot pole. I wouldn't buy AMD, either. I'd buy Intel. No, I'm not joking. https://www.howtogeek.com/intels-arc-gpus-are-good-now-and-im-tired-of-people-saying-theyre-not/
item.author: Madshrimps.be

item.title: My hunt for the best gaming laptop under $500 for students (and what I found)
item.description: When I set out on my hunt for the best gaming laptop under $500 for students, I realized I needed one machine that could handle it all: assignments, projects, essays… you name it… on a budget. As a student, you’re.. The post My hunt for the best gaming laptop…
item.author: Gadget Flow

item.title: 9 Things That Stand Out About Samsung’s Galaxy Book 6 Series
item.description: Most people stopped expecting Samsung to make an interesting laptop years ago. The Galaxy Book line has always been competent but forgettable, overshadowed by phones and tablets at every launch event. That assumption cracked at CES 2026 when Samsung unveiled …
item.author: The Gadgeteer

item.title: Going Panther Lake very quickly: Lenovo updates ThinkPad P1 line with the P1 Gen 9 after just six months
item.description: An unexpected update: Lenovo is already replacing the ThinkPad P1 Gen 8 with the next gen model, the new ThinkPad P1 Gen 9. This new version is only a small update, focused mainly on internal changes.
item.author: Notebookcheck.net

item.title: Dell Expands Professional Workstation Portfolio with New Precision and Pro Max Systems
item.description: Dell Technologies has introduced a broad refresh of its professional workstation lineup, spanning large tower systems, mobile workstations, and AI-focused developer systems. The announcement includes several additions across the Dell Pro Precision family, as …
item.author: Storagereview.com

item.title: Dell unveils Dell Pro Precision 5 Series 14 and 16 with Intel Panther Lake and LPCAMM memory
item.description: The Dell Pro Precision 5 Series 14 and Pro Precision 5 Series 16 laptops are now official. They are workstation-grade machines that come with Nvidia RTX Pro iGPUs and LPCAMM memory modules.
item.author: Notebookcheck.net

item.title: This Core Ultra 7 laptop deal for professionals with a 2K OLED 120Hz display is £427 off — Acer Swift Go 16 is just £722 with a code
item.description: Acer’s Swift Go pairs an Intel Core Ultra 7 255H processor with 16GB RAM and a 1TB SSD for demanding work, fast multitasking, and AI-powered applications.
item.author: TechRadar
